title: lupulus orbicularis
intro: Lupulus orbicularis, also known as the hop plant, is a perennial bine plant that belongs to the family Cannabaceae. The medicinal properties of the lupulus orbicularis plant are attributed to its essential oils, which contain compounds such as alpha-acids, beta-acids, and essential oils like myrcene and humulone. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate anxiety, and improve sleep quality due to its sedative and anxiolytic properties. Lupulus orbicularis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to treat various ailments, including insomnia, restlessness, and menstrual cramps.
